Historic Setting: Bernardininu Boutique in Vilnius offers a recently renovated apartment housed in a historic building. The property features private check-in and check-out services, family rooms, and free WiFi.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy a private bathroom, washing machine, and streaming services. Additional amenities include a work desk, dining area, and free toiletries.

hotels.name: AIRINN Vilnius Airport Hotel RENOVATED 2025
hotels.description_fr:
AIRINN Vilnius Airport Hotel RENOVATED 2025 is situated on the grounds of Vilnius International Airport, just 50 metres from the main terminal, offering a view of the airport runway from some rooms.

The rooms feature elegant furniture as well as a private bathroom and a TV.

Traditional Lithuanian and European cuisine is served in the restaurant and there also is a 24-hour lobby bar.

The centre of Vilnius is about 6 km away from AIRINN Vilnius Airport Hotel RENOVATED 2025, The Old Town is 5 km away and Vilnius Bus and Train Stations are 3 km from the hotel.
